title: erysimum helveticum subsp. montosicolum
intro: Erysimum helveticum subsp. montosicolum, also known as mountain wallflower, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erysimum helveticum subsp. montosicolum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
